sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28956" key="duseci/lastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσεξ-ίλαστος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n28956.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to appease</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πένθη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.609f</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
